category_sources: Official GitHub repository About text says the same.
source_facts.description says it turns YouTube or Vimeo channels, users, or playlists into podcast feeds.
display_name_sources: Official repository is mxpv/podsync and README heading uses the project name Podsync in text.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official GitHub README contains installation, configuration, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/mxpv/podsync, so repo enrichment is intentionally not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include youtube, vimeo, podcast, podcasting, and podcast-generator.
source_facts.description names YouTube, Vimeo, and podcast feeds.
